scripts.build: npm run build -w @dr-events/shared && npm run build -w @dr-events/api && npm run build -w @dr-events/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @dr-events/shared && npm run dev -w @dr-events/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @dr-events/shared && npm run dev -w @dr-events/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @dr-events/shared && npm run typecheck -w @dr-events/api && npm run typecheck -w @dr-events/web && npm run typecheck -w @dr-events/shared
